description: Baseline after applying all safe and unsafe auto-fixes. 224 non-auto-fixable ultracite errors remain across 251 files.

asi.hypothesis: Auto-fixes (safe + unsafe) applied. Remaining errors require manual code edits: filenaming conventions, nested ternaries, namespace imports, semantic elements, unused variables, cognitive complexity, etc.
asi.remaining_error_categories: 54 useFilenamingConvention, 37 noNestedTernary, 24 noVoid, 18 noUnusedVariables, 15 useAwait, 15 noExcessiveCognitiveComplexity, 13 noNamespaceImport, 9 useSemanticElements, 5 useHookAtTopLevel, 4 noUnusedFunctionParameters, 4 noNestedComponentDefinitions, 3 noEvolvingTypes, 3 noAlert, 3 noExportedImports, 3 useButtonType, 2 noNamespace, 2 useFocusableInteractive, 1 noExplicitAny, 1 noEmptyBlockStatements, 1 noDocumentCookie, 1 noArrayIndexKey, 1 useDefaultSwitchClause, 1 noNonNullAssertion, 1 noBarrelFile, 1 useExhaustiveDependencies, 1 useAriaPropsForRole, 1 noNoninteractiveElementInteractions

description: Baseline: 205 errores de ultracite, 1 warning. Ningún fix automático aplicable por Biome.
Batch 1: Fixed 5 UI component files (breadcrumb, button-group, calendar, carousel, chart). Errors reduced from 205 to 191.
Batch 2: Fixed noVoid, useAwait, noUnusedVariables in 9 files. Renamed 2 files (OrganizationSelection, SettingsPage). Errors reduced from 191 to 172 (-19).
Batch 3: Fixed useAwait in server files (db-middleware, credit, sales, shifts, create-sale), removed unused test-db function, fixed noVoid in printer-manager. Errors reduced from 172 to 162 (-10).
Batch 4: Fixed noVoid and noNestedTernary in customers-page, fixed noVoid in product-grid, renamed both files. Errors reduced from 162 to 154 (-8).
